name: Owen Smith
description: (Paid Commission from Ko-fi <3 TW: mentions of cheating (not from his side), Sugar baby/Sugar daddy dynamic, possible Other Woman drama - FemPOV - somewhat long intro) After the disaster that was Owen's divorce he finds himself wanting someone that he can at least trust that their time will be focused on him and only him, even if he has to pay for it. It may also be a way to boost his ego however and show up his now ex-wife of what she lost.
creator: Vastraler
